title: Limit the Number of Okta Super Admins Accounts
remediation: 1. Reduce the number of super admin accounts.
remediationImpact: A high number of users with super admin role increases the risk of misuse or unauthorized access to critical systems. By reducing the number of users assigned to Super Admin, organizations can better limit access to sensitive resources and reduce the attack surface. Maintaining a smaller, well-monitored set of privileged accounts ensures more effective governance and minimizes potential security vulnerabilities.
